answers.f: 13.3 N (opposing direction of motion at contact, i.e. backward)

key_concepts: rolling without slipping on horizontal surface
solution_steps: ΣFx = m·a (+ forward): P − f = m·a → 40 − f = 8a  ...(1)
ΣM_G = I_G·α (+ CCW): −f·r = I_G·α (friction at bottom, backward → CW torque = negative CCW)
Actually for rolling forward: P forward at center, friction backward at contact.
Friction backward at contact creates CW torque (negative) about G. Rolling forward means α is CW.
Taking CW as positive for α: f·r = I_G·α → f·0.25 = 0.25·α  ...(2)
